title: Download Attachment — Confluence REST API
description: Contract for binary attachment download via GET {base}{downloadLink}

request.pathDescription: Full URL constructed from the base link and the attachment's downloadLink field. Example: https://leolabs.atlassian.net/wiki/rest/api/content/att123456/download

200.description: Binary stream of the attachment file

Content-Type.description: Original MIME type of the attachment

404.description: Attachment not found or no longer exists

axiosConfig.description: Must use responseType 'stream' to avoid loading entire file into memory

implementationNotes.downloadPattern: Use response.data.pipe(fs.createWriteStream(destPath)) — same pattern as base-sdk.js toPng()
implementationNotes.retryPolicy: Uses existing retry-policy.js (3 retries, exponential backoff)
